SEARCH

Package com.nib.commons.exceptions

package com.nib.commons.exceptions
Contains exception classes used throughout the NIB Commons library.

This package includes exceptions for:

  • Control flow mechanisms (e.g., FlowException, GoToException, StopRunException)
  • Abnormal termination signals (e.g., AbendException, UserAbendException)
  • Runtime infrastructure errors (e.g., ProgramNotFoundException, VersionsMismatchException)
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.nib.commons
    Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
  • Exception Classes
    Class
    Description
    AbendException
    Exception thrown to indicate an abnormal end (abend) condition in the application.
    ContextException
    Exception thrown to indicate an error related to program context.
    ExitProgramException
    Exception thrown to indicate an EXIT program.
    ExitSectionException
    An exception indicating an exit from a specific section of code.
    FlowException
    An exception representing a flow control change
    GoToException
    Exception thrown to indicate a jump to a labeled position in the program flow.
    ProgramNotFoundException
    An exception indicating that a program was not found.
    StopRunException
    An exception indicating that the execution of a program should be stopped.
    StorageAllocationException
     
    UserAbendException
    An exception indicating a user ABEND (abnormal end) during program execution.
    VersionsMismatchException
    An exception indicating a mismatch between program and N.I.B. runtime versions.
